data.title: Salon Ecru in Roseville offers free R+Co treatment with any appointment in December.
data.description: In Roseville, California, on December 4, 2025, Salon Ecru, known as one of the top hair salons in the area, has revealed a special promotion for December. Clients who book appointments this month will receive a complimentary in-house R+Co treatment.

data.title: CES partners with Wounded Warrior Project in a commitment to community impact, enhancing support for veterans.
data.description: In Dallas on December 4, 2025, City Electric Supply (CES) unveiled a significant partnership through CES Cares, the social impact division of CES. This collaboration underscores the division's latest pillar and reinforces its dedication to community impact. The partnership showcases CES's commitment to social responsibility and its support for organizations like Wounded Warrior.

data.title: Grain Management appoints former FCC Commissioner Geoffrey Starks as Senior Advisor, enhancing expertise in digital infrastructure.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Grain Management, LLC, a prominent private investment firm specializing in digital infrastructure for the global broadband sector, revealed the selection of Geoffrey Starks, the ex-Commissioner of the Federal Communications Commission (FCC), to a key position. This move signifies Grain's strategic initiative in the industry.

data.title: Reko International Group Inc. reports Q1 fiscal 2026 results: Sales down by $1.2M, net income improves by 336.4% to $384. EPS at $0.07.
data.description: Reko International Group Inc. (TSX-V: REKO) based in Windsor, Ontario reported its first-quarter results for the period ending October 31, 2025. Highlights include a decrease in sales by $1.2 million or 11.6% compared to the previous year. Quarterly net income saw significant improvement, reaching $384 which is an increase of $296 or 336.4% from the prior year. Earnings per share stood at $0.07, in contrast to $0.02 in the previous year. The company maintained a strong cash position after repaying a $2.7 million mortgage and investing $2.2 million in growth-related capital equipment.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer named leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for financial planning software for 5th time with CCH Tagetik.
data.description: Wolters Kluwer, a prominent figure in the professional information and software solutions industry, was recently recognized as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Financial Planning Software due to its exceptional performance within the sector. Their CCH Tagetik Platform stood out for its cutting-edge features, such as AI-powered predictive budgeting and planning capabilities that include anomaly detection, driver-based analysis, and forecasting tools. These advanced functionalities provide finance leaders with valuable data-driven insights, enhancing their ability to adapt quickly, improve accuracy, and boost transparency within financial operations. This accolade showcases Wolters Kluwer's commitment to innovation and excellence in delivering top-notch solutions for financial planning, setting a high standard for the industry.

data.title: AWS unveils Graviton5 chip for Amazon EC2 M9g instances at re:Invent, boosting performance by 25% with 192 cores and 5x cache.
data.description: In Las Vegas, at AWS re:Invent, Amazon Web Services (AWS) has unveiled the new Amazon EC2 M9g instances that run on the latest Graviton5 chip. These instances promise a notable performance boost, offering up to 25% higher performance compared to the previous model. The Graviton5 chip boasts 192 cores per chip and a cache size that is 5 times larger, enabling customers to efficiently scale up workloads and enhance application performance, all while cutting down on infrastructure expenses. This marks a significant advancement in AWS's hardware offerings, emphasizing enhanced performance and cost-effectiveness.

data.title: Home Telecom boosts upgrades 5X and ARPU by 17% with Calix platform, gaining 500% in monthly recurring revenue.
data.description: Calix, Inc. shared in a press release that Home Telecom experienced a significant increase in subscriber upgrades by a factor of 5 within six months of introducing lifestyle-based residential Wi-Fi packages with Calix SmartHome™. This swift adoption resulted in nearly a 500% rise in incremental monthly recurring revenue. Additionally, the average revenue per user (ARPU) saw a boost of over 17% per upgrade. By utilizing the Calix Broadband Platform and working closely with the Calix Success™ team, the South-based company was able to achieve these impressive results.

data.title: Corporate Technologies acquires Cloud Compliance Solutions, LLC to expand cloud capabilities in SMB market. (Character count: 87)
data.description: Corporate Technologies, based in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, revealed on December 4, 2025, that they have acquired Cloud Compliance Solutions, LLC. This acquisition marks a significant expansion for Corporate Technologies into the SMB market, boosting their offerings with cloud and virtual desktop solutions. The move aims to widen Corporate Technologies' presence and enhance their ability to cater to a broader range of clients.

data.title: University of Utah receives $8M for new national prison education research center led by Erin Castro.
data.description: In Salt Lake City on December 4, 2025, researchers at the University of Utah received a significant grant of $8 million to establish the inaugural national center focused on studying prison education and promoting leadership in this field. The initiative will be spearheaded by Erin Castro, an associate professor specializing in educational leadership.

data.title: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE, Nasdaq: VZ) announces quarterly dividend of 69 cents per share on December 4.
data.description: Verizon Communications Inc. announced today that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of 69 cents for each outstanding share. Verizon is listed on both the NYSE and Nasdaq under the ticker symbol VZ.

data.title: Over 150 Teamsters at Actus Nutrition and Foremost Farms plants in Wisconsin vote to authorize strikes due to cuts in health care, pensions.
data.description: In Sparta, Wisconsin on December 4th, 2025, over 150 Teamsters working at an Actus Nutrition facility and two Foremost Farms plants have voted decisively to approve strikes in response to proposed reductions in health care, pensions, and other benefits. The workers, who are represented by a labor union, have expressed concern over the potential cuts, leading to the authorization of strikes.

data.title: Keith Crawford appointed President of Provider Network Holdings, a Waud Capital Partners portfolio company.
data.description: In Pearland, Texas, on December 4, 2025, Provider Network Holdings (PNH), a company owned by Waud Capital Partners, has appointed Keith Crawford as President. The announcement was made recently, with Mr. Crawford stepping into the role immediately. His appointment comes with extensive experience in the field, and he is expected to bring his expertise to PNH to drive further success and growth.

data.title: CollegePlannerPro receives strategic investment from The Brydon Group to support innovation and growth. (Characters: 96)
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Los Angeles, CollegePlannerPro, a prominent practice management platform designed for independent educational consultants, disclosed a significant growth investment from The Brydon Group. This investment aims to bolster the company's future innovative initiatives and enhance customer experience.

data.title: Rio Tinto aims for 7% production growth in 2025, plans to release $5-10B cash from assets, focusing on key commodities.
data.description: At its 2025 Capital Markets Day, Rio Tinto Plc (NYSE: RIO) revealed plans to focus on iron ore, copper, aluminium, and lithium to enhance safety and productivity and achieve top-tier returns. The company updated its production forecast for 2025, with copper projected at 860–875 kt (previously 780–850 kt), bauxite exceeding the earlier 59–61 Mt estimate, and aluminium anticipated at the upper limit of the 3.25–3.45 Mt range. Learn more about Rio Tinto's strategic direction and stock performance on the market.

data.title: Capital Bank boosts SBA team with experienced professionals to expand small business lending, strengthening national presence.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Rockville, Maryland, Capital Bank, N.A. revealed its plan to strengthen its Small Business Administration (SBA) team by hiring numerous skilled SBA professionals. This step aims to boost the bank's SBA services and pave the way for expanding its reach across the country in small business lending.

data.title: First Steps Recovery partners with Georgia Recovery Campus to expand services in Georgia, boosting substance use disorder treatment.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Fresno, California, First Steps Recovery (FSR) disclosed a collaboration with Georgia Recovery Campus (GRC), a prominent substance use disorder treatment provider in Georgia. This partnership aims to combine their expertise in providing a comprehensive continuum of care for individuals struggling with substance abuse. The GRC management team will work alongside FSR to enhance treatment services and expand support options for those in need.

data.title: Halozyme wins injunction against Merck's Keytruda in Germany, halting distribution. Dec 4, 2025. ($HALO)
data.description: In San Diego on December 4, 2025, Halozyme Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: HALO) disclosed that a German court has approved their injunction request against Merck. This order instructs Merck to halt the distribution and sale of Keytruda SC in Germany. The ruling was made by the Munich Regional Court.

data.title: AutoJudge transforms LLM inference with improved token processing, cutting annotation needs and speeding up processing speed while maintaining accuracy. Discover more.
data.description: AutoJudge has developed an innovative approach to speed up the inference of large language models. This method focuses on optimizing token processing, decreasing the requirement for human annotation, and enhancing processing speed while maintaining a minimal impact on accuracy. This advancement is expected to significantly improve the efficiency of language model inference.

data.title: OneStream (Nasdaq: OS) recognized as 5x Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Financial Planning Software. 详细新闻-字符包括条目及数字。
data.description: OneStream has been acknowledged in the Leaders' Quadrant for exceptional performance in executing tasks and possessing a well-rounded vision. The company, headquartered in Birmingham, Michigan, achieved this recognition on December 4, 2025. OneStream, listed on Nasdaq as OS, is a prominent enterprise Finance management platform that transforms the Office of the CFO by consolidating essential financial functions.

data.title: QuickFund.ai by TruTrade reduces trader funding approval times to average of 4 days, setting new industry standard.
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on December 4, 2025, TruTrade is excited to share that traders using the QuickFund AI platform are now receiving funded accounts in an average of only four days. This rapid process stands out as one of the fastest in the industry, marking a significant change in...
